mnemonics.title: CREATE Custom Exceptions
mnemonics.content: C - Checked or Unchecked, R - Relevant error messages, E - Extend Exception class, A - Add constructors, T - Throw using 'throw', E - Ensure proper handling

mnemonics.title: Custom Exception Steps
mnemonics.content: STEP: Specify, Throw, Extend, Provide - Specify the exception type, Throw using 'throw', Extend the Exception class, Provide constructors

mnemonics.title: Custom Exception Benefits
mnemonics.content: IMPROVE: Improved error handling, Meaningful error messages, Proper exception handling, Readability and maintainability, Outstanding code quality, Valuable feedback, Enhanced user experience
